content:
We're hiring! 

PNB Housing Finance is looking for a National Manager - Legal Collections to join our team. If you have experience and expertise in legal recoveries and litigation, we'd love to hear from you.

📍 Location: Gurgaon
📩 Send your CV to careers@pnbhousing.com on or before 9th July 2026.

#Hiring #JoinOurTeam #GharKiBaat #PakkaSupport #PNBHF
